data.title: 1,000 BTC transferred from Bybit to an unknown wallet, equivalent to $96.86 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to Whale Alert monitoring, 50 minutes ago, 1,000 BTC were transferred from Bybit to an unknown wallet, equivalent to approximately US$96.86 million.

data.title: Bybit hack, withdrawals top $5.3B, but ‘reserves exceed liabilities’ — Hacken
data.description:
Bybit’s assets fell by more than $5B after its $1.4 billion hack on Feb. 21, but independent audits confirm its reserves still exceed liabilities, ensuring full backing for user funds.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bybit-hack-withdrawals-5-3b-reserves-secure-hacken?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: SlowMist Cosine: Renzo's ezETH's 7-day Timelocker and proposal model are very mature in the Ethereum ecosystem
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News SlowMist Yuxian posted on the X platform: "Thumbs up to mETH Protocol for timely intervention and recovery of the 15,000 cmETH stolen from Bybit. At this time, the majority of people applauded this kind of review or intervention. I don’t know much about mETH Protocol yet, but I can give an example of another interesting security balance design: Renzo’s ezETH contract has too many permissions, such as upgradeability, mint/burn, etc., but the Owner is multi-signed and has a Timelocker for 7 days, and a proposal mode is implemented. If ezETH wants to do evil and is discovered in time, everyone has a 7-day buffer time to make a choice. This security balance model is very mature in the Ethereum ecosystem."

data.title: Gate.io Yubibao ETH financial management income is upgraded for a limited time, up to 12% APR
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Gate.io Yubibao ETH financial management annualized income has been upgraded for a limited time. Participating in ETH current or fixed-term financial management can enjoy up to 12% APR, with no upper limit on subscription. Among them, ETH current financial management is upgraded to 12% APR, 3-day fixed-term financial management is upgraded to 5% APR, and 7-day fixed-term financial management is upgraded to 6% APR. Participate now and easily earn flexible and high returns.

data.title: Tether Freezes USDT Linked To ByBit Hack
data.description: According to Odaily, Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino announced on the X platform that the company has frozen 181,000 USDT linked to the ByBit hacking incident. Ardoino noted that while the amount may not be substantial, it is an effective measure. Tether will continue to monitor the situation closely.

data.title: The Bybit stolen funds address currently still holds 489,395 ETH and 15,000 cmETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, the Bybit stolen funds address (from Lazarus Group) has transferred 10,000 ETH and started money laundering. Currently, the Bybit hacker holds 489,395 ETH (US$1.32 billion) and 15,000 cmETH (unable to withdraw) in 53 wallets.
